title: airport_screening_ebola_bvd: Effectiveness of airport screening for Bundibugyo ebolavirus
description: An R package and Shiny app for estimating the effectiveness of airport screening at detecting infected travellers, adapted for Bundibugyo ebolavirus (BDBV) in the context of the 2026 DRC outbreak.

creators.name: Quilty, Billy J
creators.affiliation: Charité – Universitätsmedizin Berlin; Centre for Mathematical Modelling of Infectious Diseases, London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine
